tasks.fmt: deno fmt mod.ts src tests examples docs scripts deno.json README.md AGENTS.md
tasks.check: deno check mod.ts src/*.ts src/transports/*.ts tools/capnpc-deno/*.ts tests/*.ts examples/*.ts
tasks.test:codegen: deno test --allow-read=tests/fixtures/codegen_requests/multi_schema_request.b64 tests/capnpc_deno_codegen_test.ts tests/capnpc_deno_union_codegen_test.ts tests/capnpc_deno_interface_codegen_test.ts tests/capnpc_deno_cli_test.ts tests/capnpc_deno_golden_codegen_test.ts tests/capnpc_deno_plugin_response_test.ts
tasks.verify: deno task fmt && deno task lint && deno task check && deno task test:unit
tasks.verify:real: deno task build:wasm && deno task smoke:real && deno task test:integration && deno task test:real
